features.title: Inventory Module â€” Hardcoded GL Codes & Data Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes ('1100','2100','1010','1330','6000','5000','2110') in lib/actions/inventory-gl.ts â€” all replaced with SYS_ACCOUNTS from lib/gl-accounts.ts
Zero hardcoded GL codes in app/actions/inventory.ts that reference account codes
Stock adjustments (ADJUSTMENT_IN/OUT) create correct GL journal entries via postJournalEntry
Stock transfers between warehouses create GL entries if they affect asset accounts
PO receive (PRODUCTION_IN) creates GL entry: DR Inventory Asset, CR AP or GRN clearing
SO shipment (SO_SHIPMENT) creates GL entry: DR COGS, CR Inventory Asset
All inventory hooks import from correct action files (not monolithic finance.ts)
Grep verification: zero matches for hardcoded codes in inventory action files
features.notes: Check lib/actions/inventory-gl.ts (has GL_ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE='2100' local const â€” already partially fixed), app/actions/inventory.ts, hooks/use-products.ts. Focus on whether every stock movement that has financial impact creates a journal entry.

acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in lib/actions/procurement.ts â€” all replaced with SYS_ACCOUNTS
Zero hardcoded GL codes in lib/actions/grn.ts (if exists)
PO approval creates AP bill via recordPendingBillFromPO (verify this actually works end-to-end)
GRN creation updates inventory correctly (stock increases, journal entry DR Inventory CR GRN Clearing/AP)

features.notes: procurement.ts had 2 hardcoded '2100' instances (already fixed in commit 2). Verify the GRN flow â€” does receiving goods create inventory GL entries? Check lib/actions/grn.ts.

features.title: HCM/SDM Module â€” Payrollâ†’GL & Attendance Data Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in app/actions/hcm.ts â€” all use SYS_ACCOUNTS or dynamic account lookup
Payroll posting creates proper journal entries (DR Salary Expense, CR Salary Payable, CR BPJS, CR PPh21)
Payroll disbursement creates GL entry (DR Salary Payable, CR Bank/Cash)
Attendance data flows correctly to payroll calculation (hours worked, overtime, leave deductions)
Employee leave approvals update leave balance correctly
All HCM hooks import from correct action files
Payroll GL account codes (expense, payable) are configurable or use system constants, not hardcoded strings
features.notes: HCM payroll was confirmed working in audit. But check if the account codes used in hcm.ts are hardcoded strings or use dynamic lookup. Also verify attendanceâ†’payroll data flow. Check app/actions/hcm.ts, components/hcm/.

features.title: Manufacturing Module â€” WOâ†’Inventoryâ†’GL & BOM Cost Flow Audit

Work order completion creates correct GL entries (DR WIPâ†’FG, CR Raw Materialsâ†’WIP)

Check if these should use SYS_ACCOUNTS or if the local constants in inventory-gl.ts are sufficient. Also check the BOM cost calculation flow.
